title: Cycle Detection & Merge Sorted Lists
description: Master pointer operations on linked lists, Floyd's Cycle-Finding Algorithm (Tortoise and Hare), and merging sorted nodes efficiently.
learningObjectives: Code Tortoise and Hare pointers traversal to verify loop existence.
Merge two sorted list structures in-place in linear time.

quiz.question: What is the space complexity of Floyd's Cycle-Finding Algorithm?
Why is a dummy node used when merging two sorted lists?
options: B) To act as a sentinel node that simplifies linking edge cases
C) To sort values in descending order
D) To check for cycle boundaries
quiz.answer: B) To act as a sentinel node that simplifies linking edge cases
